response.justification: Candidate has a strong, diverse software engineering background spanning web, mobile, and some embedded/low-level work, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency which is not indicated (languages listed: English, Romanian, basic German). Additionally, the resume shows minimal direct experience with embedded LAN-switch firmware, C for UNIX as a primary stack, Linux kernel modification, MACsec/802.1X security technologies, or L2/L3 networking protocols. Most recent experience is in TypeScript/Node.js full-stack and pricing platforms, not embedded security.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and low-level DLang work
Demonstrated ability to learn new stacks and own modules end-to-end
Background in testing, TDD, and developer tooling supports quality-focused embedded work
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (hard requirement)
Lacks demonstrated experience with embedded security (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) and switch/networking stacks
Minimal recent C/UNIX or Linux kernel modification work; recent focus is TypeScript/Node.js web platforms

key_factors.factor: Broad polyglot engineering background and adaptability
